message:
perf(test): consolidate messaging and dep test suites (bd-1rh)

- Consolidate messaging_test.go from 8 separate stores to 2
  (TestMessagingSuite for 7 tests sharing 1 DB, plus
  TestMailDelegateFromConfig which needs its own due to global state)
- Add t.Parallel() to TestDependencySuite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ import (
 )
 
 func TestDependencySuite(t *testing.T) {
+	t.Parallel()
 	tmpDir := t.TempDir()
 	testDB := filepath.Join(tmpDir, ".beads", "beads.db")
 	s := newTestStore(t, testDB)
